case_title: CAMERON, ELDORIS CUPP vs. WROTEN, GEORGIANA et al

docket_entries.description: JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT WROTEN, GEORGIANA SKIPWORTH, SHEMIKA

LNORRIS, JUDGE; FHENTON, CLERK; LBATARA, CSR. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. STIPULATED SETTLEMENT REACHED PRIOR TO TRIAL. PLNTF CAMERON TO OBTAIN POSSESSION OF 595 ORIZABA AVE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA ON JUN 29, 1999. LEASE FORFIETED. BACK RENT WAIVED. SECURITY DEPOSIT AND INTEREST SURRENDERED. DAMAGE RESOLUTION, IF ANY, RESERVED.
STIPULATION THAT COMMISSIONER MAY ACT AS JUDGE PRO TEMPORE, FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WROTEN, GEORGIANA SKIPWORTH, SHEMIKA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 595 ORIZABA ST. S.F. $1,426.50 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,426.50, STAYED UNTIL JUN-29-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF WILL USE THE SECURITY DEPOSIT AND INTEREST TO OFFSET THE PAST DUE RENT
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMERON, ELDORIS CUPP COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUN-07-1999 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 218 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT WROTEN, GEORGIANA SKIPWORTH, SHEMIKA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WROTEN, GEORGIANA SKIPWORTH, SHEMIKA
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMERON, ELDORIS CUPP AS TO DEFENDANT WROTEN, GEORGIANA SKIPWORTH, SHEMIKA DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $41.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMERON, ELDORIS CUPP
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT WROTEN, GEORGIANA SKIPWORTH, SHEMIKA
